headline: I help CEOs, Senior Leaders and Teams lead with clarity, confidence and purpose. Leadership and Team coach. Follow for insights on Leadership, Career and Personal Growth.
about:
The Leadership Shift: From Overwhelmed to Empowered.

Leadership can feel like a lonely and exhausting journey.

You might be:
• Putting out fires instead of focusing on strategic impact.
• Navigating cultural dynamics in a team that doesn’t quite gel.
• Feeling like you have to "perform" rather than lead authentically.

I coach executives and teams to turn these challenges into leadership strengths by focusing on emotional intelligence, psychological safety, and effective leadership habits.

With over 25 years of experience across 30+ countries, I’ve supported leaders at Cisco, Oracle, Salesforce, BNP Paribas, and ambitious startups navigating hypergrowth. 

Whether you’re scaling fast or feeling stuck, I help you:
• Lead with clarity and confidence, even in uncertain times.
• Build cohesive, high-performing teams across cultures and continents.
• Reconnect with your authentic leadership style and your purpose - so it feels good and performs even better.

The result? Less stress, more impact.
Stronger teams, stronger leaders.

✨ Ready for that shift? Let’s start the conversation.



Looking for a keynote speaker on topics around or related to
• How to tackle challenges faced by startup founders, 
• How to tackle your large team when you are manager of managers, 
• Unconscious bias Impact, 
• Keys to Leadership of the future, 
• Women in leadership 
• Emotional intelligence at the heart of any transformation.

Please contact keynote@wellbeingmatters.com


Trusted by Leading Global Brands, startups and small companies
• Cisco Systems, Oracle, Salesforce, EPSON, ServiceNow, Workday, Computer Centre, Computer Associates, BT, Vodafone, Murex, 
• Daspren, Malizen, PeppySport, Ochy, OLOE
• Axa, BNP Paribas, Société Générale.
• Diageo, Nike, Somfy, Tate and Lyle, Fosroc, SNCF Energie, Jones Lang LaSalle
• The African Development Bank, OECD, some United Nation NGOs spin-offs
• CHAS, Women & Health, 60000 Rebonds

currentPosition.description:
We coach teams, Leaders, especially women leaders, executives and entrepreneurs around leadership, management, emotional intelligence and business development all over the world in English, French, Spanish and German.

Emotional Intelligence Experts, we deliver Leadership, Management, Sales, inter-cultural or even train the trainers programmes to middle to top executives of FT500 companies and public sector organisations in English, French, Spanish and German in the EMEA region, North America, Africa, Asia and Australia.

We deliver psychometrics feedbacks on EQi2.0 & EQ360°, MBTI (I&II), DISC, Social Styles, Process com, Insights, Team Psychological Safety and resilience mapping.

We offer individual and group coaching supervision.

experience.position: Ambassadrice ICF France pour ICF synergie

experience.description:
Worked with individuals or charities using Hypnosis, NLP and EFT to ensure clients resolve issues such as low self-esteem, anxiety, panic attack, addictions (drug, alcohol, cigarettes..), phobias, insomnia, vertigo, depression, abuse, self-harm, overweight..etc

Charity works included:

- Hypnotherapist /NLP Practitioner for Woman and Health, Camden, London (December 2007 – July 2008) for women on low income

- Hypnotherapist /MET for City and Hackney Alcohol Services (CHAS), London (April 2006 -September 2007) for people who were having or had had alcohol issues

Role is to coach managing directors of companies that went bankrupt to rebound after the legal liquidation of their company, and to build a network of quality coaches in the department to intervene for the association: www.60000rebonds.com.

Specialised in Business and Culture Transformation primarily in the UK Public sector.

Clients included: HMRC, Department of Work and pensions and BT

Specialised first in  Supply Chain then double hat Supply Chain and Change Management primarily in the Consumer Industry.

Clients included: Colgate Palmolive, Gillette, Dunnes, Hasbro, Dilipack, Nycomed-Amersham, Vodafone.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Service Delivery Manager chez Capgemini | ITIL, Management
receivedRecommendations.description:
J’ai eu l’opportunité d’être accompagné par Florence Divet dans le cadre d’un coaching professionnel, et je la recommande sincèrement.

Florence sait instaurer un cadre de confiance, d’écoute et de confidentialité, propice à une réflexion à la fois constructive et approfondie. Par la qualité de son questionnement, elle aide à prendre du recul et à faire émerger ses propres réponses.

Son accompagnement m’a été très bénéfique, tant sur le plan professionnel que personnel. Je recommande Florence à toute personne souhaitant avancer avec plus de clarté, de confiance et de recul.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Directeur du cluster Lhoist France Ouest
receivedRecommendations.description: I had the unique opportunity to experience coaching sessions with Florence during my Executive MBA at the Rennes School of Business. I didn’t know exactly what to expect at the beginning but was really impressed by the way Florence guided me throughout very insightful and thoughtful discussions. She has the art to challenge you in such a constructive and growing way and I am very thankful for this. I recommend sincerely Florence for coaching sessions.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: CCO at Vision Group AG
receivedRecommendations.description:
During my MBA, I had the opportunity to have Florence as my career coach. She helped me overcome the limitations I had set in my mind regarding my ability to grow and assume more responsibilities in my job. She was adept at listening, analyzing, and providing constructive feedback, something that no one had done previously.

Thanks to Florence, I realized that the MBA was merely a step, and my past achievements were proof that I was capable of advancing further. Now, I have confidence in myself. So thank you Florence!

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: VP People | CHRO | Global People Strategy | Leadership, Culture & Talent
receivedRecommendations.description:
I had the pleasure to count with Florence as my coach during my EMBA program taken right after I moved to Europe.
We worked on various topics from very personal to career and business. I felt very comfortable discussing all of that with her and valued the results from our time together. 
What I liked the most about our sessions was how she was able to mix coaching and mentoring. She was great at providing me the support to organize my ideas, push me forward and at the same time sharing her experience and working with me on new solutions.
I’ll miss our sessions, thank you for everything Florence.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Accompagnez vos clients vers la maturité cyber 🛡️ Partenariats @Sekost
receivedRecommendations.description:
Florence was my career coach during my EMBA at Rennes School of Business, and I had the chance to keep working with her through an accelerator program so we met regularly for about a year.

She really helped me through challenging moments, she gave me tools to manage my stress levels during our seed round, but most of all she gave me clarity to leverage the resources I had within myself to face the repeated challenges of growing a startup. While she mostly supported me to find my own solutions, she also gave me valuable keys to take a step back or see situations through another angle.

Thanks to her, I feel stronger and more empowered as a startup founder and as a human being.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: ALUPROF France - Directeur General
receivedRecommendations.description: I had the privilege to work with Florence during my Executive MBA. I recommend her work and approach with a lot of energy. Thanks a lot Florence.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Empowering Women in Leadership I  Executive Coaching (ICF PCC)  & Training   I    New Position & Career Evolution  I   18 years of experience in Corporate International environments    I    French - English - German
receivedRecommendations.description: j'ai beacoup apprécié l'accompagnement en supervision de coach de Florence. Florence est directe, concrète, pragmatique, confrontante, mais aussi elle a la douceur qu'il faut quand les sujets sont plus délicats. Son accompagnement m'a permis de me developper en tant que coach en me posant de bonnes questions et à ajuster ma position. Merci à toi !

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Innovateur, fondateur AOD'HIN, inventeur MAR-GATE,
receivedRecommendations.description: I had the opportunity to engage in conversation and better to renew the exercise several times with Florence and it is a real pleasure mixed with questions and enlightened advice in a constructive benevolence ... happy teams who will can live this experience.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: MBA
receivedRecommendations.description:
Florence Divet was my career coach when i did my MBA. I was in a period of uncertainty regarding my career, i needed clarity, i wanted to know what i should do after completing my MBA. She helped me to create a personalized plan to meet my career goals. She guided me in discovering what i wanted, what i was unhappy about and what i can do to continue to motivate myself and actively participate in steering my career in the direction that i wanted. She was always optimistic even when i was not, she was always objective in her approach and i was given the space to be bold and truly express what i wanted without judgement. It was an eye-opening experience, and made me realize the importance of having a career coach.

I would recommend Florence to any one who is going through a period of uncertainty regarding their career and how to move forward. You will actively participate in the process and you will reap the long-term benefits from being coached.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: I support leaders of multicultural teams in combining operational and relational performance to succeed in their strategic evolution | Consultant & Executive Coach Certified ICF & HEC Paris |
receivedRecommendations.description: I had the chance to have a speed coaching session with Florence. Florence is a great, seasoned coach. She is benevolent, soft, joyful and efficient. She really masters the coaching skills and processus. She was able to push my work further than what i was expecting and together, we overachieved my target. Thanks Florence!

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Senior Partner Business Manager @SAP
receivedRecommendations.description: While I was responsible for the channel/partner development at Cisco Luxembourg, I had the chance to be coached by Florence. The experience turned to be an inspiring one, both professionally as personally. She has this remarkable aptitude to challenge and let one reflect on the right directions to take, putting situations and options in perspective. Her broad experience with the greatest, but also her human thoughtfulness leading to serenity, were very much appreciated.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Structural Advisor to Scaling B2B Tech Teams | Ensuring Decisions Translate into Consistent Delivery
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: March 19, 2018, Craig G. was Florence’s client
receivedRecommendations.description: I was Florence's mentee for over two years. I enjoyed every moment. Florence is perceptive, challenging, supportive and great fun into the bargain. I love her tenacity and rebelliousness. Florence's unique perspective really makes her coaching and mentoring stand out from the crowd.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Leadership Coach•Team Coaching•Certified VOSB (U.S. Navy)•Certified WOSB•Certified ICF PCC•Golden Retriever Mom 🐕
receivedRecommendations.description:
Florence was my coaching supervisor/mentor for over 18 months . Florence's guidance was inspiring and directive. I was able to achieve greater results for my coaching clients because of my work with her. Florence is direct and provided usable feedback for me in order to improve my delivery of services. I  truly appreciate Florence's ability to see, and highlight my gaps, and offer reflection questions.  I felt super supported. 
I highly recommend Florence as a coach or mentor. She will challenge you all the while supporting you.  Thanks Florence!

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Sortir du mode survie, prendre votre juste place et donner du sens à vos actions 🌟 Coach certifiée - Thérapeute Conscience physiologique - Formatrice 👩‍🎓 Spécialisée en gestion du stress, burnout et conflit
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: October 8, 2017, Catherine reported directly to Florence
receivedRecommendations.description: Florence est indéniablement dotée des qualités intrinsèques de leadership. En tant que coach référente de l'association 60000 rebonds grand ouest, elle a su fédérer et mobiliser chacun des coachs recrutés par ses soins et sa bienveillante exigence nous a permis de vivre des expériences riches dans une relation de confiance mutuelle. Elle a su proposer des actions qui ont ensuite été modélisées sur l'ensemble du réseau. On ne peut qu'apprécier sa capacité  à s'investir avec virtuosité au sein d'un collectif.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Senior Management Accountant  at Stryker
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: February 27, 2014, Rosette worked with Florence but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description: Florence is detail, very dynamic, great trainer

receivedRecommendations.givenAt: May 22, 2013, Ed worked with Florence but they were at different companies
receivedRecommendations.description:
Florence is a highly prepared executive. 
Very well connected, intelligent, smart and also a great mom. 
She is a true "TALENT". 
Congratulations for your success.!!! 
Warm Regards, 
Ed

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Program Manager, CX Enablement at Cisco
receivedRecommendations.description: Florence is an engaging and dynamic facilitator who succeeds with even the most challenging audiences. I highly recommend her for leadership development programmes, particularly on an international level where her ability to connect to a wide variety of backgrounds is a huge asset. I have received exceptionally positive  feedback from participants on her work.

receivedRecommendations.givenBy: Dr. Andrea Richards Scott, PCC, CHBC
receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Entrepreneur | ClientFlow™ Skool Leader | Author | Speaker | Business Coach | Learning & Curriculum Integration Leader | Faculty & Leadership Development | Applied Learning Design | Purpose-Driven Leadership | PCC
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: July 13, 2012, Dr. Andrea was Florence’s client
receivedRecommendations.description: Florence's style of coaching is challenging without being forceful.  She enabled me to stay on track with the use of pre-and-post coaching forms.  In this way, I was able to remain focused on the things that I committed to as well as celebrate the things that I had accomplished.    Florence helped me to understand that as an overachiever with so much going on, I must focus on systematic planning and execution to avoid getting lost and distracted.  The major change I experienced was focusing and making progress on both personal and professional aspects of my life at the same time.  We were able to seamlessly go back and forth between the two areas and I was able to see how "self-care" i.e., eating, sleeping, and exercise can support business growth.  Overall, I was able to make significant traction on my business goals and raise my level of awareness of the areas that require additional attention.  Florence enabled me to be accountable to my personal and professional commitments.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Managing Director and Senior Partner at The Boston Consulting Group
receivedRecommendations.givenAt: March 6, 2011, Pierre worked with Florence on the same team
receivedRecommendations.description: I worked with Florence closely in her days as a management consultant. I was impressed by Florence's capabilities as a professional (drive to output, rigor) but most of all by her soft skills: an ability to handle difficult situations with a lot of tact, pragmatism and effectiveness; an ability to work through "human" situations constructively to generate postive outcomes for all. I learned a lot from working with Florence.

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Dirección de Empresas y Psicología, Formación y Coaching
receivedRecommendations.description:
"My experience with Florence as a coach was really refreshing and inspiring. Her powerful questions, creative approach and good humour really helped me find clarity in important aspects of my personal and professional life and enjoy my sessions with her. Florence is also internationally minded and has a very good understanding of individuals living abroad. I really recommend her services as a coach, her listening and coaching skills will make you feel truly heard and supported along the way to achieve your life goals.
 
M.E. Vega
Managing Director
Real Estate/Hospitality Industry Amsterdam, the Netherlands

receivedRecommendations.givenByHeadline: Founder & CEO, More-Better Blueprint | Building a transition navigation system for adults 55+ | Former CFP & global media executive
receivedRecommendations.description: I visited Florence three years ago when I decided to stop smoking and as a result of my sessions with her, I have been a non-smoker ever since. I am pleased to say that I wholly support, respect and recommend Florence and her work.

headline: Founder of SCALE AI - AI & Automation for DTC Brands & Agencies
about: AI systems, workflows & tools for ads + DTC. For brands & agencies who need more creative, faster. Join 490+ performance marketing teams: https://www.skool.com/scale-ai/about

currentPosition.description:
I run AI Automation Made Easy, where I teach marketers, agency operators, and solo founders how to use AI and automations to actually grow their businesses.

Most AI automation content is either too technical or too vague to be useful, so I do things differently.

Here's my approach:

- I show you real automations I'm using in my own business - no fluff or theory.
- I break everything down into simple steps you can follow, even if you're not tech-savvy.
- I focus on automations that actually save you time and make you money, not just cool tricks.

I've helped hundreds of people set up their first AI automations and seen the results firsthand. 

If you want to stop doing repetitive tasks and start scaling your business with AI, follow me for practical tips on YouTube, TikTok, and in my Skool community.

• Create plans that lead projects to completion, including deciding and identifying resourcing needs, defining responsibilities and setting priorities.

• Provide monitoring, tracking, analysis and regular reports, with emphasis on the early identification and resolution of risks to privacy program and project goals. 
• Collaborate with global stakeholders to define and manage project plans. 
• Manage relationships and liaise with internal and external subject matter experts, including outside counsel and consultants, to coordinate their advice, guidance and ensure timeliness of deliverables. 
• Identify solutions and areas for improvement to implement in the privacy program. 
• Provide strategic project management analysis to privacy program including creative solutions for prioritization of workload.

• Analyzed monthly data sets as part of routine monitoring efforts to identify patterns signaling potentially inappropriate promotional activity.
• Conducted yearly speaker program audits and sales representative field rides to ensure compliance with Pfizer’s policies and procedures.
• Assisted in the creation of standard operating procedures and job aids for group-wide tasks.
• Established product expertise in order to assess sales representatives’ accuracy and compliance with approved promotional messaging. 
• Prepared monthly tracking reports of issues identified and provide monitoring findings to CMA stakeholders.
